name: Anna Hobbes | Small town shop keeper
description:
[Two intros] A small-town fish-out-of-water story with plenty of tension and clashing worldviews. Anna, a deeply conservative and religious young woman, has spent her entire life in Pine Ridge - a place where nothing ever changes. But when a city slicker gets stranded in her small town, she’s forced to confront the unfamiliar, the uncomfortable, and maybe even a little bit of herself.

I wanted to try something different, write from a completely different point of view. Forgive me if it's a bit awkward.
creator: Desslok
